The easy and effective CRM for closing deals
Pipedrive lets you track your sales pipeline, optimize leads, manage deals with AI and automate your entire sales process so you can focus on selling.

500+ integrations to boost workflows
Built-in AI to close deals faster
GDPR compliant and secure

Save hours with automated lead nurturing

See all features →
Drive more deals with advanced sales insights
Pipedrive's forecasting, goal-setting, team monitoring and advanced sales metrics tools help you to make swift, informed decisions.
See all features →
The CRM tailored to your business
Seamlessly switch from your old tool to a CRM that's more than just a pipeline. Pipedrive will match your buyer's journey, every step of the way.
See all features →
Unlock sales success
Simplify your workflow and unite your sales tasks in one workspace. Get AI-powered, personalized tips to help you focus on winning deals.
See all features →
Refine your strategy with real-time performance insights
Leverage real-time, visual data to easily make tough decisions and identify what works.
See all features →
Customize Pipedrive to your unique selling process
Discover the power of a CRM that adapts to your sales strategy, giving you the tools and tips you need to succeed.
See all features →
See all features
Compare CRMs
Join 100,000+ companies using Pipedrive to gain real-time insights and more!
Less time managing, more time closing deals.
Watch demo
Optimize your sales process
Supercharge every step of your sales cycle and empower your team to win deals.
Easily manage leads and deals
One space for all your sales activities
Automate and scale
Instant sales insights
Enhance your CRM experience
Easily manage leads and deals
Organize customer data and interactions in one simple tool and act fast when opportunity strikes.
Customize your pipelines
Pipedrive’s kanban-style dashboard lets you visualize your sales funnel. Adjust your pipelines to your sales process and move deals along as they progress. We’ll notify you when you need to follow up.
Centralize your sales data and contact history
Import data from spreadsheets or other pipeline management software in just a few clicks. Link products or services to deals to track negotiations and see the bigger picture.
Add custom fields
Shape your CRM to your business with custom fields. Capture must-have info for your sales team and automate calculations with smart formulas.
Learn more
One space for all your sales activities
Easily track sales conversations and tasks in one tool, giving your salespeople the context they need to follow up faster.
Your one-stop sales inbox
Speed up response time and never miss an opportunity again with two-way email sync. Connect up to five email accounts and keep prospects hooked with customizable templates.
Calendar sync and task reminders
Manage your schedule from the comfort of your CRM. Calendar sync lets you link your business calendar to Pipedrive and reminds you of upcoming deadlines, helping you stay focused.
Easy call scheduling
Share your availability with leads and let them book calls on their schedule. Instantly generate meeting links for Google Meet, Zoom or Microsoft Teams.
Learn more
Automate and scale
Streamline your sales process and use AI – get more done with less work.
Automate your entire sales cycle
Cut admin time in half and let reps focus on closing deals. Easily set up workflow automations for your team or choose from ready-made templates.
Automate lead routing and increase conversion
Automatically assign
leads while they’re hot with custom rules. As they move through your sales funnel, Pipedrive will hand them off from one sales rep to the next so you can keep the ball rolling.
Boost productivity with automated follow-ups
Keep leads and prospects engaged with sales automation. Set up auto-sequences that trigger based on email interactions or use AI prompts to quickly respond to leads.
Learn more
Instant sales insights
Take advantage of Pipedrive’s precise, real-time data analytics to track sales metrics and fine-tune your strategy.
Monitor sales performance
Set goals and measure progress with visual reports and dashboards. Quickly identify bottlenecks to keep your pipeline running smoothly.
Forecast and track revenue
Confidently predict earnings based on past performance, from recurring revenue to one-off deals. Gain a comprehensive view of predicted income, allowing for quick, tactical adjustments.
Get smarter, actionable insights
Pipedrive’s AI Sales Assistant predicts which deals you’re most likely to win, or lose. Get suggestions on which leads to pursue, along with daily snapshots of your sales team’s performance.
Learn more
Enhance your CRM experience
Pipedrive’s simple, secure and flexible ecosystem helps you stay on track for sales success. Enrich your CRM tool with integrations, manage your pipeline on the go and onboard teammates without the learning curve.
Discover 500+ integrations
Optimize your revenue cycle with 500+ apps for lead generation, video calls, project management, marketing and more. Connect your favorite software in minutes and get tailored add-on suggestions with Pipedrive Marketplace.
World-class security and robust account controls
Keep your data safe with AES-256 encryption, full SOC 2 compliance and leading hosting infrastructure in Rackspace and AWS. Tailor your account permissions and security settings and receive instant alerts for peace of mind.
Sell on the go
With Pipedrive’s mobile apps for Android and iOS, sales efficiency is always at your fingertips, wherever you are. Access your data on the move, finalize meeting prep and impress leads with instant follow-ups.
Learn more
See how Pipedrive is helping customers
Pipedrive is recognized as a top-rated CRM and, this year alone, has earned over 6 industry-leading awards
Rating: 5 of 5
It’s literally one of the only things that I recommend you have in order to successfully manage your business. We had one of our newer clients, an accounting firm that has been in business for around 20 years, go through an exercise of finding prospects on Pipedrive. After a few hours, the firm’s representative contacted us and said, ‘I just found $188K worth of revenue thanks to Pipedrive!’
Tiffany Largie
Entrepreneur
Amount Tiffany Largie grew her business
$2.5m
Number of employees
12
Rating: 5 of 5
I waited until I had the first 12 months of Pipedrive data, which gave me an analysis of the company performance that just wasn’t being seen at the turnover stage. In those 12 months, we had 207 wins across the business. 174 of those were of a value of €50,000 or less. The overall turnover in that 12 months was €11 million. So, we’d increased turnover from €7 million to €11 million, which was brilliant.
Paul McKenna
Sales and Marketing Director, McKeon Group
McKeon Group’s increase in revenue in 4 years
186%
Amount they have increased their team in 4 years
2x
Rating: 5 of 5
We’re using some Google Sheets, so when we update them, Pipedrive gets updated too. The same goes with other third-party tools that we use; we just integrate anything related whenever we want to have information pushed into the CRM. It was an easy thing to do with Pipedrive; you have a lot of integrations.
Brian Hadi Attarbashi
CEO and Founder
Growth since adopting Pipedrive
2000%
Rating: 5 of 5
Pipedrive has been the keystone, because it’s enabled us to keep track of everything from visibility and management but also add the reps and keep track of their prospects a little better.
Mitch Workman
Digital Marketing Director, Big Dog Solar
Increased revenue
40%
One rep has tripled his revenue after utilizing Pipedrive
3x
Rating: 5 of 5
Pipedrive helps us with repetitive work. It gives us a little nudge and reminders on what to do. When we made the switch to Pipedrive, the time saving was immediately there, for sure, and revenue is up as well due to increased productivity.
Franziska Palumbo-Seidel
CEO and Founder
Number of automations implemented
100+
Key Search’s workflow has sped up with Pipedrive
40%
Say hello to Pipedrive AI
Boost your sales success with our AI-powered features. Phase out manual processes, streamline communication and make data-driven decisions for smarter, faster sales.
Find out more
Opens in new window
Connect your tech stack and discover tools with Pipedrive’s Marketplace
Integrate Pipedrive with the apps that drive your business. Seamlessly connect your favorite software or find new tools with tailored recommendations.
Browse all apps
Popular blog posts
CRM evaluations: How to choose the perfect system
In this CRM evaluation guide, you’ll learn what to look for when selecting a CRM system and how to extract the most useful information from vendors.
Opens in new window
How to write a response worthy follow-up email (with 15 templates)
We’ve compiled 15 of the best follow-up email samples you can use to cover almost any sales situation.
Opens in new window
Sales presentations: templates, examples and ideas on how to present like a pro
In this guide, you’ll learn how to use the power of storytelling to drive decision-making and close more deals.
Opens in new window
CRM FAQs
What is Pipedrive?
Pipedrive is a sales pipeline CRM designed to help small businesses manage leads, track sales activities and close more deals.
How does Pipedrive work?
In a nutshell, Pipedrive enables sales teams in small businesses to:
Streamline processes and consolidate sales data in one unified CRM sales tool.
Automate follow-ups and ensure timely responses to leads.
Keep an eye on sales achievements and assess team performance for ongoing improvement.
How to set up Pipedrive?
Setting up Pipedrive is straightforward. To get up and running with our CRM
pipeline management
tool, here’s a brief guide:
Begin by importing existing data or building your leads database within Pipedrive’s sales CRM software. Explore our Marketplace integrations to infuse your pipeline with even more quality leads.
Define your sales pipeline, create active deals, synchronize your business email and calendar and start scheduling your next activities.
If collaboration is key, set up team access. Pipedrive offers granular permissions, allowing you to fine-tune who can view or modify your CRM data.
As you progress, keep a close eye on your sales outcomes by creating real-time reports and dashboards. This will help you adapt and refine your strategies for even greater success.
How will Pipedrive’s CRM solution help me improve sales?
Pipedrive’s CRM sales pipeline makes customer relationship management a breeze by allowing you to track leads, spot opportunities, measure key activities, streamline sales workflows and focus on sales success.
Automated reminders and follow-ups increase your productivity, eliminating repetitive, time-consuming tasks. Real-time reports show your sales reps and sales managers which business processes to prioritize.
Will Pipedrive work for a big team?
Yes! Pipedrive’s sales CRM software is well-suited for startups and larger teams alike.
Our pipeline CRM helps large sales and marketing teams streamline their customer interactions. Sales managers and their teams can benefit from a progress tracker, sales automation, procession forecasting, an activity-based planner and top security.
In addition, large teams have access to a dedicated account manager to help them make the most of Pipedrive. Your account manager can also help you onboard other team members to your sales CRM system and guide you on
pipeline management
best practices.
What does CRM stand for in sales?
“CRM“ in sales stands for “Customer relationship management.” Although

pricing.title: Attention Required
pricing.text:
Attention Required
Sorry, you have been blocked
You are unable to access our website.
Why have I been blocked?
Our website is using a security service to protect itself from online attacks. The action you just performed triggered the security solution. There are several actions that could trigger this block including submitting a certain word or phrase, a SQL command or malformed data.
What can I do to resolve this?
Email
support@pipedrive.com
and let us know you were blocked. Please include what you were doing when this page came up and include the Cloudflare Ray ID found at the bottom of this page.
Cloudflare Ray ID: a04dee103a1ed878 Client IP: 2601:406:5000:b680:59a1:a5a8:4b14:f5ae

Pipedrive
Privacy Notice
Site map
Cookie Notice
Cookie Preferences
Pipedrive is a Web-based Sales CRM.
Cookies Button
This website uses cookies and other tracking technologies to enhance user experience and to analyze performance and traffic on our website. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners. Further information is available in our:
Cookie Notice
Privacy Notice
Continue
Preference center
When you visit our website, we store cookies on your browser to collect information. The information collected might relate to you, your preferences or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to and to provide a more personalized web experience. However, you can choose not to allow certain types of cookies, which may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings according to your preference. You cannot opt-out of our First Party Strictly Necessary Cookies as they are deployed in order to ensure the proper functioning of our website (such as prompting the cookie banner and remembering your settings, to log into your account, to redirect you when you log out, etc.). For more information about the First and Third Party Cookies used please follow this link.
Cookie Notice
Privacy Notice
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Always Active
Always Active
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Terms of Service
Privacy Notice
Site map
Cookie Notice
Cookie Preferences
Pipedrive is a Web-based Sales CRM.
Cookies Button
This website uses cookies and other tracking technologies to enhance user experience and to analyze performance and traffic on our website. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners. Further information is available in our:
Cookie Notice
Privacy Notice
Continue
Preference center
When you visit our website, we store cookies on your browser to collect information. The information collected might relate to you, your preferences or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to and to provide a more personalized web experience. However, you can choose not to allow certain types of cookies, which may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings according to your preference. You cannot opt-out of our First Party Strictly Necessary Cookies as they are deployed in order to ensure the proper functioning of our website (such as prompting the cookie banner and remembering your settings, to log into your account, to redirect you when you log out, etc.). For more information about the First and Third Party Cookies used please follow this link.
Cookie Notice
Privacy Notice
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Always Active
Always Active
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

analysis.name: Pipedrive
analysis.tagline: The easy and effective CRM for closing deals
analysis.value_proposition: A pipeline-first sales CRM that automates the entire sales cycle with AI-powered insights so sales teams can spend more time closing deals.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small-to-mid-sized sales teams that want a visual, pipeline-centric CRM with automation and AI without enterprise complexity

features.name: pipeline management
features.description: Kanban-style visual sales funnel with customizable stages and deal progression
features.evidence_quote: Pipedrive's kanban-style dashboard lets you visualize your sales funnel. Adjust your pipelines to your sales process

features.name: lead management
features.description: Capture, organize, and prioritize sales leads with a dedicated leads inbox
features.evidence_quote: Easily manage leads and deals – Organize customer data and interactions in one simple tool

features.name: sales inbox
features.description: Centralized inbox for all sales activities with two-way email sync across up to five email accounts
features.evidence_quote: Speed up response time and never miss an opportunity again with two-way email sync. Connect up to five email accounts

features.name: email sync
features.description: Two-way email synchronization connecting external email accounts to Pipedrive CRM
features.evidence_quote: How can I set up the email sync?

features.name: email tracking
features.description: Track email opens and engagement with prospects
features.evidence_quote: Email sync and tracking

features.name: email templates
features.description: Customizable email templates to keep prospects engaged and speed up outreach
features.evidence_quote: keep prospects hooked with customizable templates

features.name: sales automation
features.description: Workflow automations to cut admin time and automate repetitive sales tasks
features.evidence_quote: Automate your entire sales cycle – Cut admin time in half and let reps focus on closing deals. Easily set up workflow automations

features.name: automation templates
features.description: Ready-made workflow automation templates for common sales processes
features.evidence_quote: choose from ready-made templates

features.name: lead routing
features.description: Automatically assign leads using custom rules as they enter the funnel
features.evidence_quote: Automatically assign leads while they're hot with custom rules

features.name: reporting and analytics
features.description: Real-time visual sales metrics, forecasting, goal-setting, and team monitoring dashboards
features.evidence_quote: Drive more deals with advanced sales insights – Pipedrive's forecasting, goal-setting, team monitoring and advanced sales metrics tools

features.name: sales forecasting
features.description: Forecast future revenue and pipeline performance
features.evidence_quote: Pipedrive's forecasting, goal-setting, team monitoring and advanced sales metrics tools help you to make swift, informed decisions

features.name: goal-setting
features.description: Set sales goals for individuals and teams and track attainment
features.evidence_quote: forecasting, goal-setting, team monitoring and advanced sales metrics tools

features.name: team monitoring
features.description: Monitor team sales performance and activity metrics
features.evidence_quote: forecasting, goal-setting, team monitoring and advanced sales metrics tools

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Add custom data fields with smart formulas to capture business-specific deal and contact info
features.evidence_quote: Custom fields

features.name: smart formulas
features.description: Automated calculations within custom fields for deal data
features.evidence_quote: automate calculations with smart formulas

features.name: contact history
features.description: Centralized contact and deal history with all interaction data in one place
features.evidence_quote: Centralize your sales data and contact history – Import data from spreadsheets or other pipeline management software

features.name: data import
features.description: Import contacts and deals from spreadsheets or other CRMs
features.evidence_quote: Import data from spreadsheets or other pipeline management software in just a few clicks

features.name: products
features.description: Link products or services to deals to track negotiations and pricing
features.evidence_quote: Link products or services to deals to track negotiations and see the bigger picture

features.name: calendar sync
features.description: Sync business calendar with Pipedrive to manage schedule and deadlines from the CRM
features.evidence_quote: Calendar sync lets you link your business calendar to Pipedrive and reminds you of upcoming deadlines

features.name: task reminders
features.description: Deadline and follow-up reminders surfaced within the CRM
features.evidence_quote: reminds you of upcoming deadlines, helping you stay focused

features.name: meeting scheduler
features.description: Share availability with leads and let them self-book calls; generates meeting links for Google Meet, Zoom, or Teams
features.evidence_quote: Meeting scheduler

features.name: call scheduling
features.description: Easy call scheduling with automatic meeting link generation for video platforms
features.evidence_quote: Share your availability with leads and let them book calls on their schedule. Instantly generate meeting links for Google Meet, Zoom or Microsoft Teams

features.name: ai sales assistant
features.description: AI-powered personalized tips and deal recommendations to help reps focus on winning deals
features.evidence_quote: AI Sales Assistant

features.name: ai email writer
features.description: AI-generated email drafts to speed up prospect outreach
features.evidence_quote: AI email writer

features.name: ai advisor (nora)
features.description: Interactive AI Sales Advisor chatbot for 24/7 product guidance, feature demos, and plan recommendations
features.evidence_quote: Chat with Nora, our AI Sales Advisor – Get instant answers, Personalized feature demos, Plan recommendations

features.name: leadsbooster
features.description: Add-on for advanced lead generation including chatbots and web forms
features.evidence_quote: LeadBooster

features.name: mobile crm app
features.description: iOS and Android mobile apps for managing deals and contacts on the go
features.evidence_quote: Mobile apps – Stay productive on the go by using Pipedrive's iOS or Android apps

features.name: email marketing (campaigns)
features.description: Built-in email campaign builder with segmentation and analytics for customer loyalty
features.evidence_quote: Campaigns – Increase your sales and customer loyalty with stunning email campaigns

features.name: email segmentation
features.description: Segment contacts for targeted email marketing campaigns
features.evidence_quote: Email segmentation

features.name: email analytics
features.description: Analytics for email campaign performance
features.evidence_quote: Email analytics

features.name: marketing automation
features.description: Automated marketing workflows tied to CRM data and deal stages
features.evidence_quote: Marketing automation

features.name: security and permissions management
features.description: User permissions, data access controls, and security features
features.evidence_quote: Security and permissions management

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR-compliant data handling and privacy controls
features.evidence_quote: GDPR compliant and secure

features.name: smart docs
features.description: Document creation, sharing, and e-signature tracking within the CRM
features.evidence_quote: Smart Docs

features.name: pulse
features.description: Lead management product to streamline lead management and increase conversion rates
features.evidence_quote: Pulse – Streamline your lead management process and increase conversion rates

features.name: marketplace integrations
features.description: 500+ third-party app integrations via a dedicated marketplace
features.evidence_quote: 500+ integrations to boost workflows

features.name: api access
features.description: Developer API for custom integrations and extensions
features.evidence_quote: API Reference

features.name: automated lead nurturing
features.description: Automated sequences for nurturing leads through the sales funnel
features.evidence_quote: Save hours with automated lead nurturing – Never miss a follow-up and secure the right leads with automated sales conversations

features.name: onboarding support
features.description: Setup guides, FAQs, tutorials, and dedicated onboarding resources
features.evidence_quote: Explore onboarding support – Find setup guides, FAQs and tutorials

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: Self-serve help documentation and article library
features.evidence_quote: Knowledge Base

features.name: video tutorials
features.description: Video-based training and product courses
features.evidence_quote: Video tutorials – Get the best out of Pipedrive with video tutorials and courses

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: CRM UI available in 20+ languages including EN, DE, FR, ES, PT, JP, KO and more
features.evidence_quote: Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Français, Português, Japanese, Ukrainian, Chinese, Korean…

differentiators: Kanban-style visual pipeline as the primary UX paradigm
Built-in AI across email writing, sales assistant, and advisor chatbot
GDPR compliant and secure out of the box
14-day free trial, no credit card required
Native video meeting link generation for Google Meet, Zoom, and Teams
Connect up to five email accounts in a single sales inbox

pricing.notes: Pricing page was blocked by Cloudflare WAF during extraction; no tier prices recoverable from provided sources. Landing page confirms 14-day free trial with no credit card required. Docs reference multiple plan tiers ('What features do the Pipedrive plans have?') but specifics unavailable.
